title: PluckableArrows
description: Renders arrows stuck in mobs and allows picking arrows out of mobs
body:
no longer shall you suffer from losing your precious arrows in the bodies of soulless mobs. with this mod you're able to pick your arrows back out of mobs though if you dont, they'll be dropped when the mob dies. arrows are also rendered on mobs like how they are with the player. you can also take arrows out of yourself by crouching and right-clicking

[video](https://youtu.be/9b3cpi3_V-c)
